verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ طسٓ ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Ṭā’ Sīn. Those are the signs of the Qur’ān and a clear Book,

verses.quran_arabic: هُدًۭى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: a guidance and good news for the believers,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: who observe the prayer and give the alms, and they are certain of the Hereafter.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: Those who do not believe in the Hereafter – We have made their deeds appear enticing to them, and they wander blindly.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
verses.text: Those are the ones for whom (there is) an evil punishment, and in the Hereafter they will be the worst losers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Surely you have indeed received the Qur’ān from One (who is) wise, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًۭا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍۢ قَبَسٍۢ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Moses said to his family: ‘Surely I perceive a fire. I shall bring you some news of it, or I shall bring you a flame – a torch – so that you may warm yourselves.’

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسۭيٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦٓ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ  مُوسۭيٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ  لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُمُۥ مِنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُمُۥ بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَصۡطَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُمُۥ مِنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُمُۥ بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَصۡطَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسْتُ نَاراٗ سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: اِذْ قَالَ مُوس۪ىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّيَ ءَانَسْتُ نَاراٗ سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ اَوَ اٰتِيكُم بِشِهَابِ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand of a borrowed flame, that you may warm yourselves.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: But when he came to it, he was called: ‘Blessed is He who is in the fire, and whoever is around it. Glory to God, Lord of the worlds!

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Moses! Surely I am God, the Mighty, the Wise.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّۭ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًۭا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ ۚ يَٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: And: ‘Cast (down) your staff!’ When he saw it wiggling as if it were a snake, he turned around, retreating, and did not look back. ‘Moses! Do not fear! Surely in My presence the envoys do not fear

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍۢ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: – except for the one who has done evil, (and) then has exchanged good after evil – surely I am forgiving, compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍۢ ۖ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايَٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: Put your hand inside your cloak. It will come out white, unharmed – (these are two) among nine signs for Pharaoh and his people. Surely they are a wicked people.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايَٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةًۭ قَالُوا۟ هَٰذَا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: But when Our signs came to them visibly, they said, ‘This is clear magic.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًۭا وَعُلُوًّۭا ۚ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: They denied them, even though they were convinced of them in themselves, out of evil and haughtiness. See how the end was for the fomenters of corruption!

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمَٰنَ عِلْمًۭا ۖ وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍۢ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We gave David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, ‘Praise (be) to God, who has favored us over many of His believing servants!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ ۖ وَقَالَ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Solomon inherited (it) from David, and said, ‘People! We have been taught the speech of birds, and we have been given (some) of everything. Surely this – it indeed is clear favor.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمَٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.text: Gathered before Solomon were his forces – jinn, and men, and birds – and they were arranged (in rows)

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌۭ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمْلُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ مَسَٰكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمَٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: – until, when they came upon the Wādī of the Ants, an ant said, ‘Ants! Enter your dwellings, or Solomon and his forces will crush you without realizing (it).’

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًۭا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَٰلِحًۭا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: But he smiled, laughing at its words, and said, ‘My Lord, (so) dispose me that I may be thankful for your blessing with which You have blessed me and my parents, and that I may do righteousness (that) pleases You, and cause me to enter, by Your mercy, among your righteous servants.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
verses.text: He reviewed the birds, and said, ‘Why do I not see the hudhud? Or is it one of the absent?

verses.quran_arabic: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًۭا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: I shall indeed punish it severely, or slaughter it, or it will bring me a clear authority.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍۢ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍۢ يَقِينٍ
verses.text: But it did not stay (away) for long, and said, ‘I have encompassed what you have not encompassed, and I have brought you reliable news from (the people of) Sheba.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةًۭ تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely I found a woman ruling over them, and she has been given (some) of everything, and she has a great throne.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: I found her and her people prostrating themselves before the sun instead of God. Satan has made their deeds appear enticing to them, and he has kept them from the way, and they are not (rightly) guided.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: (He did this) so that they would not prostrate themselves before God, who brings forth what is hidden in the heavens and the earth. He knows what you hide and what you speak aloud.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ اُ۬لۡخَبۡءَ فِي اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ اُ۬لۡخَبۡءَ فِي  اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَاَلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَم مَّا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُخۡفُونَ وَمَا تُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever you hide and whatever you make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يُخۡفُونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُواْ لِلهِ اِ۬لذِے يُخْرِجُ اُ۬لْخَبْءَ فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يُخْفُونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُواْ لِلهِ اِ۬لذِے يُخْرِجُ اُ۬لْخَبْءَ فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالَارْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يُخْفُونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: that they do not prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever they hide and whatever they make public.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ۩
verses.text: God – (there is) no god but Him, Lord of the great throne.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘We shall see whether you have spoken the truth or are one of the liars.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتَٰبِى هَٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Go with this letter of mine, and cast it (down) to them. Then turn away from them and see what they return.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَتْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتَٰبٌۭ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: She said, ‘Assembly! Surely an honorable letter has been cast (down) to me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمَٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: Surely it is from Solomon, and surely it (reads): “In the Name of God, the Merciful, the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: Do not exalt yourselves over me, but come to me in surrender.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَتْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَفْتُونِى فِىٓ أَمْرِى مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ
verses.text: She said, ‘Assembly! Make a pronouncement to me about my affair. I do not decide any affair until you bear me witness.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أُو۟لُوا۟ قُوَّةٍۢ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ بَأْسٍۢ شَدِيدٍۢ وَٱلْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَٱنظُرِى مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘We are full of strength and full of harsh violence, but the affair (belongs) to you. See what you will command.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةًۭ ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: She said, ‘Surely kings, when they enter a town, corrupt it, and make the upper class of its people the lowest, and that is what they will do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍۢ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: Surely I am going to send a gift to them, and see what the envoys bring back.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمَٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍۢ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌۭ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
verses.text: When he came to Solomon, he said, ‘Would you increase me with wealth, when what God has given me is better than what He has given you? No! (It is) you (who) gloat over your own gift.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍۢ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةًۭ وَهُمْ صَٰغِرُونَ
verses.text: Return to them! We shall indeed come upon them with forces which they have no power to face, and we shall indeed expel them from there in humiliation, and they will be disgraced.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Assembly! Which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in surrender?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ ۖ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌۭ
verses.text: A crafty one of the jinn said, ‘I shall bring it to you before you (can) rise from your place. Surely I have strength for it (and am) trustworthy.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ ٱلَّذِى عِندَهُۥ عِلْمٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هَٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّى لِيَبْلُوَنِىٓ ءَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ ۖ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّى غَنِىٌّۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
verses.text: One who had knowledge of the Book said, ‘I will bring it to you in the wink of an eye.’ So when he saw it set before him, he said, ‘This is from the favor of my Lord to test me (to see) whether I am thankful or ungrateful. Whoever is thankful is thankful only for his own good, and whoever is ungrateful – surely my Lord is wealthy, generous.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Disguise her throne for her. We shall see whether she is (rightly) guided or is one of those who are not (rightly) guided.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ قِيلَ أَهَٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ ۖ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ ۚ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: So when she came, it was said, ‘Is your throne like this?’ She said, ‘It seems like it.’ ‘And we had been given the knowledge before her, and were in surrender,

verses.quran_arabic: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍۢ كَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: but what she served, instead of God, kept her back. Surely she was from a disbelieving people.’

verses.quran_arabic: قِيلَ لَهَا ٱدْخُلِى ٱلصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةًۭ وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ صَرْحٌۭ مُّمَرَّدٌۭ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَٰنَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It was said to her, ‘Enter the palace.’ When she saw it, she thought it was a pool (of water), and she uncovered her legs. He said, ‘Surely it is a polished palace of crystal.’ She said, ‘My Lord, surely I have done myself evil. I surrender with Solomon to God, Lord of the worlds.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We sent to Thamūd their brother Ṣāliḥ: ‘Serve God!’ And suddenly they were two groups disputing each other.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ ۖ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My people! Why do you seek to hurry the evil before the good? Why do you not ask forgiveness from God, so that you may receive compassion?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ ۚ قَالَ طَٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌۭ تُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘We have an evil omen about you and those who are with you.’ He said, ‘Your evil omen is with God. But you are a people being tested!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍۢ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: In the city (there) was a group of nine persons who were fomenting corruption on the earth, and not setting (things) right.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Swear to each other by God, “We shall indeed attack him and his family by night.” Then we shall indeed say to his ally, “We were not witnesses of the destruction of his family” and “Surely we are truthful indeed.”’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًۭا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًۭا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: They schemed a scheme, but We (too) schemed a scheme, though they did not realize (it).

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ أَنَّا دَمَّرْنَٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: See how the end of their scheme was: We destroyed them and their people – all (of them)!

canonical_variants.arabic: فَاَنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡۚ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَاَنظُرۡ  كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡۚ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ  أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمُۥ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَقَوۡمَهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمُۥ إِنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمُۥ وَقَوۡمَهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَانظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْۖ إِنَّا دَمَّرْنَٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَانظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمُۥٓۖ إِنَّا دَمَّرْنَٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So look at how the outcome of their scheming was: We did destroy them and their people, all of them.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Those are their houses, collapsed because of the evil they did. Surely in that is a sign indeed for a people who know.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: And We rescued those who believed and guarded (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفَٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: And Lot, when he said to his people: ‘Do you commit immorality with your eyes open?

verses.quran_arabic: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةًۭ مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌۭ تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.text: Do you indeed approach men with lust instead of women? But you are an ignorant people!’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌۭ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
verses.text: The only response of his people was that they said, ‘Expel the house(hold) of Lot from your town, (for) surely they are men who keep themselves clean.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَنجَيْنَٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَٰهَا مِنَ ٱلْغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: So We rescued him and his family, except for his wife. We decreed that she (would be) one of those who stayed behind.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًۭا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: And We rained down on them a rain. Evil was the rain on those who had been warned!

verses.quran_arabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Praise (be) to God, and peace (be) upon His servants whom He has chosen!’ Is God better, or what they associate?

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَىٰۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ أَمَّا تُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَىٰۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ أَمَّا تُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلِ اِ۬لْحَمْدُ لِلهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ اِ۬لذِينَ اَ۪صْطَفَىٰۖ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا تُشْرِكُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلِ اِ۬لْحَمْدُ لِلهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ اِ۬لذِينَ اَ۪صْطَف۪ىٰٓۖ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ اَمَّا تُشْرِكُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Say, “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what you associate?”

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍۢ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَن تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌۭ يَعْدِلُونَ
verses.text: Or (is He not better) who created the heavens and earth, and sent down water from the sky for you, and then by means of it We cause orchards to grow, full of beauty, whose trees you could never grow? (Is there any other) god with God? No! But they are a people who equate (others to Him).

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًۭا وَجَعَلَ خِلَٰلَهَآ أَنْهَٰرًۭا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Or (is He not better) who made the earth a dwelling place, and placed rivers in the midst of it, and made firm mountains for it, and placed a partition between the two seas? (Is there any other) god with God? No! But most of them do not know (it).

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Or (is He not better) who responds to the distressed (person) when he calls on Him and removes the evil, and establishes you as successors on the earth? (Is there any other) god with God? Little do you take heed!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ اُ۬لۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do they constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ اُ۬لۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا  دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ  أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا يَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do they constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you remind yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُۥ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمُۥ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُۥ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمُۥ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّنْ يُّجِيبُ اُ۬لْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لْأَرْضِۖ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ قَلِيلاٗ مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّنْ يُّجِيبُ اُ۬لْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ اُ۬لسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ اَ۬لَارْضِۖ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ قَلِيلاٗ مَّا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you constantly remember.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّن يَهْدِيكُمْ فِى ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ وَمَن يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦٓ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Or (is He not better) who guides you in the darkness of the shore and the sea, and who sends the winds as good news before His mercy? (Is there any other) god with God? God is exalted above what they associate!

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لۡبَرِّ وَاَلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦٓۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي  ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لۡبَرِّ وَاَلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ  رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمُۥ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمُۥ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيحَ نُشُرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۗ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the wind as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّنْ يَّهْدِيكُمْ فِے ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ وَمَنْ يُّرْسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُراَۢ بَيْنَ يَدَےْ رَحْمَتِهِۦۖ أَٰ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَّنْ يَّهْدِيكُمْ فِے ظُلُمَٰتِ اِ۬لْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ وَمَنْ يُّرْسِلُ اُ۬لرِّيَٰحَ نُشُراَۢ بَيْنَ يَدَےْ رَحْمَتِهِۦٓۖ أَ۟لَٰهٞ مَّعَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ تَعَٰلَى اَ۬للَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you through the darkness(es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds as revivers ahead of His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّن يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or (is He not better) who brings about the creation, (and) then restores it, and who provides for you from the sky and the earth? (Is there any other) god with God? Say: ‘Bring your proof, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘No one in the heavens or the earth knows the unseen except God. They do not realize when they will be raised up.

verses.quran_arabic: بَلِ ٱدَّٰرَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ مِّنْهَا ۖ بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
verses.text: No! Their knowledge is confused concerning the Hereafter. No! They are in doubt about it. No! They are blind to it.’

canonical_variants.arabic: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي اِ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.

canonical_variants.arabic: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي اِ۬لۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي  شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.

canonical_variants.arabic: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمُۥ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُمُۥ مِنۡهَا عَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.

canonical_variants.arabic: بَلۡ أَدۡرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمُۥ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمُۥ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُمُۥ مِنۡهَا عَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: rather, their knowledge has been grasped in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰبًۭا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
verses.text: Those who disbelieve say, ‘When we have become dust, and our fathers (too), shall we indeed be brought forth?

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰباٗ وَءَابَآؤُنَا أَٰئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied said, “When we have become dust, and our forefathers—can it be that we will really be brought out?”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقَالَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰباٗ وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied said, “When we have become dust, and our forefathers—can it be that we will really be brought out?”

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هَٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Certainly we have been promised this before, we and our fathers. This is nothing but old tales.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Travel the earth and see how the end was for the sinners.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍۢ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Do not sorrow over them, nor be in distress because of what they are scheming.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘When (will) this promise (come to pass), if you are truthful?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘It may be that part of what you seek to hurry is bearing down on you (now).’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Surely your Lord is indeed full of favor to the people, but most of them are not thankful (for it).

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: Surely your Lord indeed knows what their hearts conceal and what they speak aloud.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍۢ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: (There is) nothing hidden in the sky or the earth, except (that it is recorded) in a clear Book.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: Surely this Qur’ān recounts to the Sons of Israel most of their differences,

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدًۭى وَرَحْمَةٌۭ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and surely it is indeed a guidance and mercy to the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُم بِحُكْمِهِۦ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Surely your Lord will decide between them by His judgment. He is the Mighty, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: Put your trust in God, (for) surely you (stand) on the clear truth.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
verses.text: Surely you cannot make the dead to hear, nor can you make the deaf to hear the call, when they turn away, withdrawing.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, you cannot make the dead hear, nor can the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ ا۪ذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, you cannot make the dead hear, nor can the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهَٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلَٰلَتِهِمْ ۖ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Nor can you guide the blind out of their straying. You cannot make (anyone) hear, except the one who believes in Our signs, and so they submit.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةًۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: When the word falls upon them, We shall bring forth for them a creature from the earth, (which) will speak to them: ‘The people were not certain of Our signs.’

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ اَ۬لۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡۚ إِنَّ اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ  اَ۬لۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡۚ إِنَّ  اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمُۥ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمُۥ إِنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمُۥ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمُۥ إِنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْۖ إِنَّ اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمُۥٓ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لَارْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمُۥٓۖ إِنَّ اَ۬لنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will speak to them. Indeed, mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍۢ فَوْجًۭا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when We shall gather from every community a crowd of those who have called Our signs a lie, and they are arranged (in rows)

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايَٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: –until, when they come, He will say, ‘Did you call My signs a lie, when you did not encompass them in knowledge, or what (it was) you were doing?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُوا۟ فَهُمْ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: And the word will fall upon them because of the evil they have done, and they will not speak.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they not see that We made the night for them to rest in, and the day to see? Surely in that are signs indeed for a people who believe.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دَٰخِرِينَ
verses.text: On the Day when there is a blast on the trumpet, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified, except for whomever God pleases, and all will come to Him humbled,

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةًۭ وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ ۚ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: and you see the mountains, supposedly solid, yet passing by (as) the clouds pass by – (such is) the work of God who has perfected everything. Surely He is aware of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَرَى اَ۬لۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهۡيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ اَ۬لسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ اَ۬للَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِيٓ أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَر۪ي اَ۬لۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهۡيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ اَ۬لسَّحَابِۚ  صُنۡعَ اَ۬للَّهِ اِ۬لَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسِبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And you see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍۢ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
verses.text: (On that Day) whoever brings a good (deed) will have a better one than it, and they will be secure from the terror of that Day.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِالۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُمُۥ مِن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُمُۥ مِن فَزَعِ يَوۡمِئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِالْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٞ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

canonical_variants.arabic: مَن جَآءَ بِالْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٞ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعِ يَوْمَئِذٍ اٰمِنُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from the horror of that day,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: But whoever brings an evil (deed), they will be cast down face first into the Fire: ‘Are you repaid (for anything) except for what you have done?’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هَٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍۢ ۖ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: ‘I have only been commanded to serve the Lord of this land, who has made it sacred. To Him everything (belongs). And I have been commanded to be one of those who submit,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ ۖ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
verses.text: and to recite the Qur’ān. Whoever is (rightly) guided is guided only for himself, and whoever goes astray [. . .].’ Say: ‘I am only one of the warners.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا ۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: And say: ‘Praise (be) to God! He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. Your Lord is not oblivious of what you do.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ اِ۬لۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ اِ۬لۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ  سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what you do.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And say, “Praise be to Allah; He will show you His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your Lord oblivious of what they do.”
